title: Reconquesta
description: Reconquesta is a medieval, tactical collectable card game where you, as a Majesty, Recruit Conquerors to siege rival realms and reduce their Glory Points to zero.
instructions: On your turn, draw a card, Pillage Resources, then Recruit, move, and battle with your Conquerors on the Battlefield, using Actions, Artillery, and Defenses to push into enemy zones and strike the opposing Majesty’s Glory Points. An interactive tutorial and full 'how to play' guide are available in-game to walk you step-by-step through your first Reconquesta battles.
knownIssues: Action cards are not playable in response to your opponent's actions.
Some parts of the Interactive Tutorial are buggy.

title: Card Crawl: Deep Roots
description: A solitaire dungeon crawler played entirely with a standard deck. Descend through 4 floors, manage a shrinking hand, and survive the boss encounter.
instructions: Shuffle the deck. Draw floor cards one at a time — face cards are monsters, number cards are loot or traps. Your hand is your health. Reach the King on floor 4 with any cards left in hand to win.
knownIssues: Undo button currently allows infinite undo (balance issue, not a bug).
Floor 3 trap text is unclear — feedback wanted specifically here.

title: Trade Routes
description: A lightweight economic strategy prototype about building caravan routes between 6 cities with fluctuating resource prices.
instructions: On your turn, move your caravan along one route, buy low, sell high, and invest in route upgrades. First to 30 gold wins. This is an early digital mock of the physical prototype — expect rough edges.
knownIssues: Price fluctuation algorithm is a placeholder — feedback on pacing especially welcome.
No end-game screen yet, game just stops at 30 gold.
